title: Protocol for DNA Extraction from Cheese
author: De Cesare, Alessandra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Video demonstrating the protocol for DNA extraction from cheese based on PowerFood Microbial DNA isolation kit MO BIO, according to Yang et al. (2016) procedure. Training video elaborated within the ArtiSaneFood project.
steps_raw: Video demonstrating the protocol for DNA extraction from cheese based on PowerFood Microbial DNA isolation kit MO BIO, according to Yang et al. (2016) procedure. Training video elaborated within the ArtiSaneFood project.
